steps.title: Locate the target age category and year
steps.content: The question asks for members aged 14–17 in 1995. Scan the table's row labels to find the category that exactly matches this age range: “Seniors (14–17 years).” Then find the 1995 column.

steps.title: Read the value at the intersection
steps.content: The Seniors (14–17 years) row in the 1995 column contains 52. The other options either misread a different year (45 is Seniors in 1994) or pull from a different category entirely (727 is Juniors in 1995). That matches choice D — D is correct.
